query: SELECT sp.localId, sp.name, sp.description, sp.packagePrice, sp.originalPrice, sp.sessionDurationMinutes, sp.totalSessions, sp.isActive, sp.category FROM service_packages sp JOIN business_owners bo ON sp.businessOwnerId = bo.id WHERE bo.businessName LIKE '%Lime%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT sp.localId, sp.name, sp.description, sp.packagePrice, sp.originalPrice, sp.sessionDurationMinutes, sp.totalSessions, sp.isActive, sp.category FROM service_packages sp JOIN business_owners bo ON sp.businessOwnerId = bo.id WHERE bo.businessName LIKE '%Lime%' LIMIT 20;

rows.name: Glow & Go Bundle
rows.description: Perfect combo for a full hair refresh — Women's Haircut & Style plus a Blowout & Style for a polished finish. Save $15 vs booking separately.

rows.name: Color & Care Package
rows.description: Full Color treatment paired with a Deep Conditioning Treatment to keep your color vibrant and hair healthy. Save $20 vs booking separately.

rows.name: Wellness Escape Package
rows.description: Unwind with a Swedish Massage (60 min) followed by a soothing Aromatherapy Massage. The ultimate relaxation duo. Save $25 vs booking separately.
